privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding a calendar event to OpenSIS (a real Student Information System by Open Solutions for Education, Inc.) with the following verified specifications: event title 'Annual Science Fair', date May 20, 2026 (2026-05-20), description containing keywords 'gym' and 'presentations' referencing 'Student project presentations in the gym (1PM - 4PM)', and the event must be marked as an Event type, not a Holiday. The calendar event data is synthetic, created specifically for this task and not sourced from external real-world data.
